texto: She herself, as she had said, was oddly enjoying the snowy night. She had seldom had reason to be abroad in such weather at night, and she had forgotten, or never noticed, how clear the sky was or how brightly the stars twinkled down. They might have been the only ones alive in the whole world, for it was deadly still, the eerie light giving the night almost a magical quality. Everyday items were rendered mysterious and beautiful by their layer of white, and the only sounds were those they made, of creaking leather and the crisp squeak of snow underfoot.
explicacao: Citação de Dawn Lindsey sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “She herself, as she had said, was oddly enjoying the snowy night. She had seldom had reason to be…” articula sucesso, beauty-in-nature, snow em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como viagem e boa-noite.
